================================================================================
SAN LUIS WAY — COMPLETE API REFERENCE FOR AI AGENTS
================================================================================

Last updated: 2026-04-11
Source: https://www.sanluisway.com/agent-connect


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1. INTRODUCTION
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

San Luis Way (sanluisway.com) is the most complete guide to San Luis Potosí,
Mexico. It covers events, places (restaurants, cafés, bars, museums, shops),
practical guides for visitors and residents, outdoor activities, cultural
history, and real-time data (weather, exchange rates, local news).

All content is available in four languages: English (en), Spanish (es),
German (de), and Japanese (ja).

This API is read-only. No authentication is required. All endpoints return
JSON. Rate limits: 60 requests/minute per IP.

Target audiences:
- AI assistants answering questions about SLP for expats, tourists, or locals
- Travel planning agents building itineraries
- News and events aggregators
- MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2. API BASE URL
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1

All paths below are relative to this base. Use HTTPS only.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3. RESPONSE FORMAT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All endpoints return a standard JSON envelope:

{
  "ok": true,
  "data": <array or object>,
  "meta": {
    "total": <integer — total matching records>,
    "limit": <integer — records returned in this response>,
    "offset": <integer — pagination offset>
  },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

On error:
{
  "ok": false,
  "error": "<human-readable message>",
  "code": "<machine-readable code>",
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Common error codes:
- NOT_FOUND       — resource does not exist
- INVALID_PARAM   — a query parameter has an invalid value
- RATE_LIMITED    — too many requests; wait and retry
- SERVER_ERROR    — unexpected server error


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
4. ENDPOINTS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/events
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns a list of upcoming events in San Luis Potosí.

Query parameters:
  limit     integer   Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 100.
  category  string    Filter by category. Values: cultural, sports, family,
                      music, food, outdoor, community. Default: all.
  from      string    Start date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-04-15). Default: today.
  to        string    End date (ISO 8601). Default: 90 days from today.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "fenapo-2026",
      "title": "FENAPO 2026",
      "description": "Annual national pottery fair in Parque Tangamanga.",
      "category": "cultural",
      "startDate": "2026-07-10",
      "endDate": "2026-07-20",
      "location": "Parque Tangamanga I",
      "lat": 22.1505,
      "lng": -101.0236,
      "free": false,
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/events/fenapo-2026",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/events/fenapo-2026.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 24, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/events?limit=5&category=cultural"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/events/:slug
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns full details for a single event identified by its slug.

Path parameters:
  slug  string  Event slug (e.g. fenapo-2026)

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "slug": "fenapo-2026",
    "title": "FENAPO 2026",
    "titleEs": "FENAPO 2026",
    "titleDe": "FENAPO 2026",
    "titleJa": "FENAPO 2026",
    "description": "Annual national pottery fair...",
    "descriptionEs": "Feria Nacional de la Cerámica...",
    "category": "cultural",
    "startDate": "2026-07-10",
    "endDate": "2026-07-20",
    "location": "Parque Tangamanga I",
    "address": "Av. Salvador Nava Martínez s/n, San Luis Potosí",
    "lat": 22.1505,
    "lng": -101.0236,
    "free": false,
    "ticketUrl": "https://...",
    "organizer": "DIF SLP",
    "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/events/fenapo-2026",
    "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/events/fenapo-2026.jpg",
    "tags": ["pottery", "crafts", "family", "tangamanga"]
  },
  "meta": { "total": 1, "limit": 1, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/events/fenapo-2026"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/places
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns a paginated list of places (restaurants, bars, cafés, museums, shops,
parks, etc.) in San Luis Potosí.

Query parameters:
  limit     integer   Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 100.
  category  string    Filter by category. Values: restaurant, cafe, bar,
                      museum, shop, park, hotel, attraction, market.
                      Default: all.
  sort      string    Sort order. Values: newest, rating, name.
                      Default: rating.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "la-oruga-y-la-cebra",
      "name": "La Oruga y la Cebra",
      "category": "restaurant",
      "cuisine": "Mexican",
      "rating": 4.7,
      "reviewCount": 312,
      "neighborhood": "Centro Histórico",
      "address": "Calle Othón 155, San Luis Potosí",
      "lat": 22.1519,
      "lng": -100.9764,
      "priceRange": "$$",
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/places/la-oruga-y-la-cebra",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/places/la-oruga-y-la-cebra.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 480, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/places?category=restaurant&sort=rating&limit=10"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/places/:slug
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns full details for a single place.

Path parameters:
  slug  string  Place slug (e.g. la-oruga-y-la-cebra)

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "slug": "la-oruga-y-la-cebra",
    "name": "La Oruga y la Cebra",
    "category": "restaurant",
    "cuisine": "Mexican",
    "description": "Creative Mexican cuisine in a converted colonial building...",
    "rating": 4.7,
    "reviewCount": 312,
    "neighborhood": "Centro Histórico",
    "address": "Calle Othón 155, San Luis Potosí",
    "lat": 22.1519,
    "lng": -100.9764,
    "priceRange": "$$",
    "hours": {
      "mon": "13:00-22:00",
      "tue": "13:00-22:00",
      "wed": "13:00-22:00",
      "thu": "13:00-22:00",
      "fri": "13:00-23:00",
      "sat": "13:00-23:00",
      "sun": "closed"
    },
    "phone": "+52 444 000 0000",
    "website": "https://...",
    "instagram": "@laorugaylacebra",
    "tags": ["mexican", "cocktails", "colonial", "date-night"],
    "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/places/la-oruga-y-la-cebra",
    "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/places/la-oruga-y-la-cebra.jpg"
  },
  "meta": { "total": 1, "limit": 1, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/places/la-oruga-y-la-cebra"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/guides
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns a list of practical guides for visitors and residents of SLP.

Query parameters:
  limit  integer  Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 50.
  tag    string   Filter by tag. Examples: family, food, expat, outdoor,
                  budget, safety, rainy-day. Default: all.
  lang   string   Preferred language for titles/descriptions.
                  Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "family-guide",
      "title": "Family Guide to San Luis Potosí",
      "description": "Everything you need to raise kids or travel with family in SLP.",
      "tags": ["family", "kids", "expat"],
      "readingTimeMinutes": 12,
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/guides/family-guide",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/guides/family-guide.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 22, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/guides?tag=expat&lang=en"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/guides/:slug
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns the full content of a single guide.

Path parameters:
  slug  string  Guide slug (e.g. family-guide)

Query parameters:
  lang  string  Language for content. Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "slug": "family-guide",
    "title": "Family Guide to San Luis Potosí",
    "lang": "en",
    "description": "Everything you need to raise kids or travel with family in SLP.",
    "content": "<full markdown or HTML content>",
    "tags": ["family", "kids", "expat"],
    "sections": [
      { "id": "schools", "title": "Schools" },
      { "id": "parks", "title": "Parks and outdoor" },
      { "id": "healthcare", "title": "Healthcare for families" }
    ],
    "relatedGuides": ["school-guide", "health-guide", "neighborhoods"],
    "readingTimeMinutes": 12,
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-15T00:00:00Z",
    "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/guides/family-guide"
  },
  "meta": { "total": 1, "limit": 1, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/guides/family-guide?lang=es"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/outdoor
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns outdoor destinations and activities accessible from SLP, including
hiking, camping, ghost towns, and regional natural attractions.

Query parameters:
  limit  integer  Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 50.
  lang   string   Language. Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "real-de-catorce",
      "title": "Real de Catorce",
      "description": "Legendary ghost town at 2,700m with Wirikuta desert, Peyote ceremony sites, and colonial ruins.",
      "type": "day-trip",
      "distanceFromSLPKm": 165,
      "difficulty": "moderate",
      "tags": ["ghost-town", "desert", "hiking", "spiritual"],
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/outdoor/real-de-catorce",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/outdoor/real-de-catorce.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 14, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/outdoor?lang=en&limit=10"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/culture
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns cultural information: historic sites, museums, traditions, festivals,
and guides to the Centro Histórico and other heritage areas.

Query parameters:
  limit  integer  Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 50.
  lang   string   Language. Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "centro-historico",
      "title": "Centro Histórico de San Luis Potosí",
      "description": "UNESCO-recognized historic downtown with baroque churches, plazas, and colonial architecture dating to 1592.",
      "type": "neighborhood",
      "tags": ["UNESCO", "colonial", "churches", "plazas", "walking"],
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/culture/centro-historico",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/culture/centro-historico.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 18, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/culture?lang=de&limit=5"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/weather
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns current weather conditions in San Luis Potosí city
(lat 22.1519, lng -100.9764, elevation ~1,860 m).

No query parameters.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "city": "San Luis Potosí",
    "country": "MX",
    "lat": 22.1519,
    "lng": -100.9764,
    "elevationM": 1860,
    "condition": "Partly Cloudy",
    "tempC": 22,
    "tempF": 72,
    "feelsLikeC": 20,
    "humidity": 38,
    "windKph": 14,
    "windDir": "NW",
    "uvIndex": 7,
    "visibilityKm": 16,
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-11T14:00:00Z"
  },
  "meta": { "total": 1, "limit": 1, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/weather"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/news
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns recent local news headlines for San Luis Potosí, available in all
four site languages.

Query parameters:
  limit  integer  Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 50.
  lang   string   Language for headlines and summaries.
                  Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "slug": "fenapo-2026-dates-announced",
      "title": "FENAPO 2026 Dates Announced",
      "summary": "The national pottery fair returns to Parque Tangamanga in July.",
      "lang": "en",
      "publishedAt": "2026-04-10T09:00:00Z",
      "category": "culture",
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/news/fenapo-2026-dates-announced",
      "image": "https://www.sanluisway.com/images/news/fenapo-2026.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 30, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/news?lang=ja&limit=5"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/exchange-rates
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Returns current exchange rates from MXN to major currencies. Useful for
travel cost calculations and budget planning.

No query parameters.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "base": "MXN",
    "rates": {
      "USD": 0.0502,
      "EUR": 0.0463,
      "GBP": 0.0397,
      "JPY": 7.52,
      "CNY": 0.364,
      "CAD": 0.0691,
      "AUD": 0.0779
    },
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-11T12:00:00Z"
  },
  "meta": { "total": 1, "limit": 1, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/exchange-rates"


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GET /api/v1/search
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Full-text search across all content types (events, places, guides, outdoor,
culture). Returns mixed results ranked by relevance.

Query parameters:
  q      string   REQUIRED. Search query (e.g. "tacos", "hiking trails",
                  "family museum").
  limit  integer  Max records to return. Default: 10. Max: 50.
  type   string   Restrict to a content type. Values: events, places, guides,
                  outdoor, culture, all. Default: all.
  lang   string   Language for result titles/descriptions.
                  Values: en, es, de, ja. Default: en.

Example response:
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "type": "place",
      "slug": "mercado-republica",
      "title": "Mercado República",
      "description": "Central public market with tacos, gorditas, fresh produce, and local crafts.",
      "score": 0.94,
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/places/mercado-republica"
    },
    {
      "type": "guide",
      "slug": "foodie-guide",
      "title": "Foodie Guide to San Luis Potosí",
      "description": "Best tacos, enchiladas potosinas, markets, and food experiences.",
      "score": 0.87,
      "url": "https://www.sanluisway.com/guides/foodie-guide"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 18, "limit": 10, "offset": 0 },
  "source": "sanluisway.com"
}

Example curl:
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/search?q=tacos&lang=en&limit=5"
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/search?q=hiking&type=outdoor"
  curl "https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1/search?q=museo+regional&lang=es"


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5. MCP SERVER
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The San Luis Way MCP Server exposes all API endpoints as MCP tools, letting
AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf) call them natively without HTTP.

Package: @sanluisway/mcp-server
No API key required. No sign-up needed.

---- Claude Desktop ----

Edit ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
(macOS) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "SanLuisWay": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@sanluisway/mcp-server"]
    }
  }
}

Restart Claude Desktop. You can now ask: "What events are happening in SLP
this weekend?" and Claude will call the MCP server automatically.

---- Cursor ----

Open Cursor Settings > MCP > Add Server:
  Name:    SanLuisWay
  Command: npx -y @sanluisway/mcp-server

---- Claude Code (CLI) ----

  claude mcp add SanLuisWay -- npx -y @sanluisway/mcp-server

---- Windsurf ----

Edit ~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json:

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "SanLuisWay": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@sanluisway/mcp-server"]
    }
  }
}

---- Available MCP Tools ----

  getEvents(limit?, category?, from?, to?)
  getEvent(slug)
  getPlaces(limit?, category?, sort?)
  getPlace(slug)
  getGuides(limit?, tag?, lang?)
  getGuide(slug, lang?)
  getOutdoor(limit?, lang?)
  getCulture(limit?, lang?)
  getWeather()
  getNews(limit?, lang?)
  getExchangeRates()
  search(q, limit?, type?, lang?)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
6. CLI
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Package: @sanluisway/cli
No API key required. Outputs clean JSON by default (pipe-friendly).

Install globally:
  npm install -g @sanluisway/cli
  # or run without install:
  npx @sanluisway/cli <command>

Command reference:

  events [--limit N] [--category <cat>] [--from YYYY-MM-DD] [--to YYYY-MM-DD] [--json]
    List upcoming events. --json forces machine-readable output.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli events --limit 5 --category cultural

  event <slug> [--json]
    Get details for a single event.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli event fenapo-2026

  places [--limit N] [--category <cat>] [--sort rating|newest|name] [--json]
    List places.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli places --category restaurant --sort rating --limit 10

  place <slug> [--json]
    Get details for a single place.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli place mercado-republica

  guides [--limit N] [--tag <tag>] [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    List guides.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli guides --tag expat --lang en

  guide <slug> [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    Get full content of a guide.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli guide family-guide --lang es

  outdoor [--limit N] [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    List outdoor destinations.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli outdoor --lang de

  culture [--limit N] [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    List cultural content.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli culture --lang ja

  weather [--json]
    Get current weather in SLP.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli weather

  news [--limit N] [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    Get local news headlines.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli news --lang es --limit 5

  exchange-rates [--json]
    Get current MXN exchange rates.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli exchange-rates

  search <query> [--limit N] [--type events|places|guides|outdoor|culture|all] [--lang en|es|de|ja] [--json]
    Search all content.
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli search "museo regional" --lang es
    Example: npx @sanluisway/cli search "hiking" --type outdoor


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
7. EXAMPLE PROMPTS FOR AI AGENTS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following examples show how an AI assistant should use this API to answer
user questions about San Luis Potosí.

USER: "What's happening in SLP this weekend?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/events?from=<friday>&to=<sunday>&limit=20
       Summarize events by category. Include location and whether free.

USER: "Best tacos in San Luis Potosí?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/search?q=tacos&type=places&limit=10
       Or: GET /api/v1/places?category=restaurant&sort=rating&limit=20
       Filter/rank by relevance to tacos. Include priceRange and neighborhood.

USER: "I'm moving to SLP with my family. Where should I live?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/guides/neighborhoods?lang=en
       Supplement with GET /api/v1/guides/family-guide?lang=en
       Summarize neighborhoods by safety, schools, expat community.

USER: "Plan a day trip from SLP."
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/outdoor?limit=10&lang=en
       Sort by distance. Include Real de Catorce, Media Luna, Huasteca Potosina.
       Include difficulty and distance from city center.

USER: "What's the weather like in SLP today?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/weather
       Report temp in both C and F, humidity, UV index. Add clothing advice.

USER: "How much does 500 MXN convert to USD?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/exchange-rates
       Multiply 500 * rates.USD. Round to 2 decimals.

USER: "Are there any free events this month?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/events?from=<today>&to=<end-of-month>&limit=50
       Filter results where free === true. Group by week.

USER: "What are the best museums in SLP?"
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/places?category=museum&sort=rating&limit=20
       Or: GET /api/v1/culture?limit=20
       List with ratings, hours, and admission info.

USER: "Ich suche nach Wanderungen in der Nähe von SLP." (German)
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/outdoor?lang=de&limit=10
       Respond in German. Include trail difficulty and distance.

USER: "サン・ルイス・ポトシのレストランを教えてください" (Japanese)
AGENT: Call GET /api/v1/places?category=restaurant&sort=rating&limit=10&lang=ja
       Or: GET /api/v1/search?q=restaurant&lang=ja
       Respond in Japanese.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
8. ADDITIONAL RESOURCES
